scope: //... (root module only; contrib/* and cmd/* nested modules excluded)
rationale: The root go.mod (github.com/go-kratos/kratos/v3) covers the core framework packages (transport, middleware, config, encoding, errors, log, selector, registry, internal). Gazelle generates Go libraries+tests for this single coherent module; the many nested go.mod subtrees under contrib/ and cmd/ are excluded to keep one resolvable dependency graph.
module_bazel:
module(
    name = "kratos",
    version = "0.0.0",
)

bazel_dep(name = "rules_go", version = "0.61.1")
bazel_dep(name = "gazelle", version = "0.51.3")
bazel_dep(name = "rules_proto", version = "7.1.0")
bazel_dep(name = "protobuf", version = "35.1")

go_sdk = use_extension("@rules_go//go:extensions.bzl", "go_sdk")
go_sdk.download(version = "1.25.4")

go_deps = use_extension("@gazelle//:extensions.bzl", "go_deps")
go_deps.from_file(go_mod = "//:go.mod")
root_build:
load("@gazelle//:def.bzl", "gazelle")

# gazelle:prefix github.com/go-kratos/kratos/v3
# gazelle:exclude cmd
# gazelle:exclude contrib
# gazelle:exclude third_party
# gazelle:exclude docs
gazelle(name = "gazelle")
anticipated_risks: version-suffix prefix /v3 must be correct or imports won't resolve
go:generate and .pb.go committed generated files (treated as plain Go sources, usually fine)
internal/testdata proto .pb.go files referenced by tests — committed, so OK without proto compilation
build-tag-specific files (codec_go1.20.go, project_linux/windows_test) handled by gazelle platform constraints
transport/grpc tests may pull large grpc/otel transitive deps via go_deps
